inputs.label: Group 1 adverse-outcome planning estimate
inputs.note: Inspired by published adverse-outcome rates in regional observational studies. Planning estimate only. Not a specific clinical recommendation.

inputs.label: Group 2 improved-care planning target
inputs.note: Hypothetical improved-care planning target for demonstration purposes only. Not from the same study as p1.

inputs.label: Statistical power
inputs.note: 80% probability of detecting the assumed difference if it truly exists under these planning assumptions.

planningContext.method: Two-proportion z-test. Uses the assumed difference between p1 and p2, with specified alpha and power.
planningContext.p1Note: Inspired by published adverse-outcome rates in regional observational studies. Planning estimate only.
planningContext.p2Note: Hypothetical improved-care planning target for demonstration. Not from the same study.
planningContext.dropoutAdjustment: Not included. Add inflation factor for expected dropout before use in a real study.

assumptions.text: p1 and p2 are planning estimates. Their quality directly affects the sample-size result.
These numbers do not include dropout or non-response adjustment.
Equal group sizes assumed (n per group).

limitations.text: This calculation does not validate study design or clinical sufficiency.
This is not medical advice. Values require justification before any real study.
p1 and p2 are demonstration values. A real study requires evidence-based justification for these estimates.
